targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT asteroid_id) AS "Total NEOs" FROM neo_close_approaches
SELECT COUNT(*) AS "Profiles" FROM neo_agency_sbdb
SELECT COUNT(*) AS "PHAs" FROM neo_agency_sbdb WHERE is_pha = TRUE
SELECT COUNT(*) AS "Active" FROM neo_agency_sentry WHERE status = 'active'
SELECT COUNT(*) AS "ESA Risk" FROM neo_agency_esa WHERE on_risk_list = TRUE
SELECT COUNT(*) AS "Fireballs" FROM neo_fireball_events

SELECT 'NeoWs' AS metric, ROUND(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM now()-MAX(ingestion_time))/3600,1) AS "Hours" FROM neo_close_approaches
UNION ALL SELECT 'SBDB', ROUND(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM now()-MAX(ingestion_time))/3600,1) FROM neo_agency_sbdb
UNION ALL SELECT 'Sentry', ROUND(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM now()-MAX(ingestion_time))/3600,1) FROM neo_agency_sentry
UNION ALL SELECT 'CAD', ROUND(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM now()-MAX(ingestion_time))/3600,1) FROM neo_agency_cad
UNION ALL SELECT 'ESA', ROUND(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM now()-MAX(ingestion_time))/3600,1) FROM neo_agency_esa
UNION ALL SELECT 'Fireball', ROUND(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM now()-MAX(ingestion_time))/3600,1) FROM neo_fireball_events

SELECT CASE WHEN cnt>=4 THEN '4+ sources' WHEN cnt=3 THEN '3 sources' WHEN cnt=2 THEN '2 sources' ELSE '1 source' END AS "Coverage", COUNT(*) AS "Asteroids"
FROM (SELECT n.asteroid_id, (CASE WHEN s.asteroid_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END + CASE WHEN sen.asteroid_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END + CASE WHEN e.asteroid_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END + CASE WHEN c.asteroid_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS cnt
FROM (SELECT DISTINCT asteroid_id FROM neo_close_approaches) n LEFT JOIN neo_agency_sbdb s ON s.asteroid_id=n.asteroid_id LEFT JOIN neo_agency_sentry sen ON sen.asteroid_id=n.asteroid_id LEFT JOIN neo_agency_esa e ON e.asteroid_id=n.asteroid_id LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT asteroid_id FROM neo_agency_cad) c ON c.asteroid_id=n.asteroid_id) sub GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1 DESC

SELECT source AS "Source", COUNT(*) AS "Total", COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status_code=200) AS "OK", COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status_code=404) AS "404", COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status_code>=500) AS "5xx", MAX(last_checked_at) AS "Last Check"
FROM neo_agency_fetch_status GROUP BY source ORDER BY source

SELECT metric_date AS "time", asteroid_count AS "Daily", AVG(asteroid_count) OVER (ORDER BY metric_date ROWS BETWEEN 6 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS "7-Day Avg"
FROM neo_daily_metrics WHERE metric_date BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() ORDER BY metric_date

SELECT metric_date AS "time", avg_risk_score AS "Avg Risk", hazardous_count AS "Hazardous", anomaly_count AS "Anomalies"
FROM neo_daily_metrics WHERE metric_date BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() ORDER BY metric_date
SELECT MAX(palermo_scale_cum) AS "Max Palermo" FROM neo_agency_sentry WHERE status='active'
SELECT MAX(torino_scale) AS "Max Torino" FROM neo_agency_sentry WHERE status='active'
SELECT COUNT(*) AS "Watch List" FROM neo_agency_sentry WHERE status='active'

SELECT 'active' AS "Status", COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status='active') AS "Count" FROM neo_agency_sentry UNION ALL SELECT 'removed' AS "Status", COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status='removed') AS "Count" FROM neo_agency_sentry

SELECT
  ROUND((palermo_scale_cum::numeric / 1.0)::integer * 1.0, 1)::text AS "Palermo Bin",
  COUNT(*) AS "Count"
FROM neo_agency_sentry
WHERE palermo_scale_cum IS NOT NULL AND status = 'active'
GROUP BY ROUND((palermo_scale_cum::numeric / 1.0)::integer * 1.0, 1)
ORDER BY ROUND((palermo_scale_cum::numeric / 1.0)::integer * 1.0, 1)

SELECT CASE WHEN torino_scale=0 THEN '0-Normal' WHEN torino_scale=1 THEN '1-Monitor' WHEN torino_scale BETWEEN 2 AND 4 THEN '2-4 Attention' WHEN torino_scale>=5 THEN '5+ Threat' ELSE 'Unknown' END AS "Level", COUNT(*) AS "Count"
FROM neo_agency_sentry WHERE torino_scale IS NOT NULL AND status='active' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT fullname AS "Object", impact_probability AS "IP", torino_scale AS "TS", palermo_scale_cum AS "PS Cum", palermo_scale_max AS "PS Max", n_impacts AS "# Impacts", impact_date_range AS "Years", ROUND(energy_mt::numeric,1) AS "Energy (MT)", ROUND(diameter_km::numeric,3) AS "Diam (km)", ROUND(v_impact_km_s::numeric,1) AS "V Impact", last_obs AS "Last Obs", cdate AS "Updated"
FROM neo_sentry_watchlist LIMIT 50

SELECT esa_designation AS "Designation", esa_name AS "Name", ROUND(diameter_m::numeric,0) AS "Diam (m)", CASE WHEN diameter_certain THEN '✓' ELSE '~' END AS "Certain", vi_date AS "VI Date", ip_max AS "IP Max", ps_max AS "PS Max", ts AS "TS", ROUND(vel_km_s::numeric,1) AS "Vel", years AS "Years", ip_cum AS "IP Cum", ps_cum AS "PS Cum"
FROM neo_agency_esa WHERE on_risk_list=TRUE ORDER BY ps_max DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 50

SELECT s.designation AS "Object", ROUND(s.palermo_scale_cum::numeric,2) AS "JPL PS", ROUND(e.ps_cum::numeric,2) AS "ESA PS", ROUND((s.palermo_scale_cum - e.ps_cum)::numeric,2) AS "Δ PS", s.torino_scale AS "JPL TS", e.ts AS "ESA TS", ROUND(s.diameter_km::numeric,3) AS "JPL Diam (km)", ROUND((e.diameter_m/1000.0)::numeric,3) AS "ESA Diam (km)", ROUND(ABS(s.diameter_km - e.diameter_m/1000.0)::numeric,3) AS "Δ Diam", s.impact_date_range AS "JPL Years", e.years AS "ESA Years" FROM neo_agency_sentry s JOIN neo_agency_esa e ON LOWER(e.esa_designation) = LOWER(s.designation) WHERE s.status = 'active' AND e.on_risk_list = TRUE ORDER BY s.palermo_scale_cum DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 50

panels.description: ESA risk list entries with no matching active Sentry object by designation. Empty means every ESA risk object has a Sentry counterpart or the ESA table has no on-list rows.
panels.title: ESA-Only Risk Objects

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  e.esa_designation AS "Object",
  e.esa_name AS "Name",
  ROUND(e.diameter_m::numeric, 0) AS "Diam (m)",
  ROUND(e.ps_max::numeric, 2) AS "PS Max",
  e.ts AS "TS",
  e.years AS "Years"
FROM neo_agency_esa e
WHERE e.on_risk_list = TRUE
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM neo_agency_sentry s
    WHERE LOWER(s.designation) = LOWER(e.esa_designation)
      AND s.status = 'active'
  )
ORDER BY e.ps_max DESC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 30

panels.description: Active Sentry objects with no matching ESA risk-list row by designation. Empty means every active Sentry entry has a counterpart on the ESA risk list (or there are no active Sentry rows).
panels.title: Sentry-Only Risk Objects

targets.rawSql:
SELECT s.designation AS "Object", s.palermo_scale_cum AS "PS Cum", s.torino_scale AS "TS", s.n_impacts AS "Impacts", s.impact_date_range AS "Years", ROUND(s.diameter_km::numeric,3) AS "Diam (km)"
FROM neo_agency_sentry s
WHERE s.status = 'active'
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM neo_agency_esa e
    WHERE e.on_risk_list = TRUE
      AND LOWER(e.esa_designation) = LOWER(s.designation)
  )
ORDER BY s.palermo_scale_cum DESC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 30

panels.title: SBDB Measured vs NeoWs Estimated Diameter

targets.rawSql: SELECT s.fullname AS "Object", ROUND(s.diameter_km::numeric, 3) AS "SBDB (km)", ROUND(n.diam_max::numeric, 3) AS "NeoWs Est (km)", ROUND(ABS(s.diameter_km - n.diam_max)::numeric, 3) AS "Δ (km)", ROUND((ABS(s.diameter_km - n.diam_max) / NULLIF(s.diameter_km, 0) * 100)::numeric, 1) AS "Δ%", s.orbit_class_name AS "Class", s.albedo AS "Albedo" FROM neo_agency_sbdb s JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT ON (asteroid_id) asteroid_id,   estimated_diameter_km_max::numeric AS diam_max   FROM neo_close_approaches   ORDER BY asteroid_id, close_approach_date DESC) n ON n.asteroid_id = s.asteroid_id WHERE s.diameter_km IS NOT NULL AND n.diam_max IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ABS(s.diameter_km - n.diam_max) DESC LIMIT 30

panels.title: PHA Close Approach History from CAD

targets.rawSql:
SELECT c.approach_date AS "time", MIN(c.distance_au) AS "Closest PHA (AU)", COUNT(*) AS "PHA Approaches"
FROM neo_agency_cad c JOIN neo_agency_sbdb s ON s.asteroid_id=c.asteroid_id WHERE s.is_pha=TRUE AND c.approach_date BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT s.fullname AS "Object", s.palermo_scale_cum AS "Palermo", c.approach_date AS "Next Approach", ROUND(c.distance_au::numeric,6) AS "Dist (AU)", ROUND(c.v_rel_km_s::numeric,2) AS "V Rel"
FROM neo_agency_sentry s JOIN LATERAL (SELECT approach_date, distance_au, v_rel_km_s FROM neo_agency_cad WHERE asteroid_id=s.asteroid_id AND approach_date>='1899-12-30' ORDER BY approach_date LIMIT 1) c ON TRUE WHERE s.status='active' ORDER BY c.approach_date LIMIT 30

panels.title: Orbit Class Risk Heatmap: PHA% by Class

targets.rawSql: SELECT orbit_class_name AS "metric", ROUND((pha_count * 100.0 / NULLIF(total, 0))::numeric, 1) AS "PHA %" FROM neo_orbit_class_dist WHERE total >= 5 ORDER BY (pha_count * 100.0 / NULLIF(total, 0)) DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT s.fullname AS "Object", ROUND(sb.moid_au::numeric,6) AS "MOID (AU)", s.palermo_scale_cum AS "Palermo", s.torino_scale AS "TS", sb.orbit_class_name AS "Class", ROUND(sb.eccentricity::numeric,4) AS "e", ROUND(sb.inclination_deg::numeric,2) AS "i (°)"
FROM neo_agency_sentry s JOIN neo_agency_sbdb sb ON sb.asteroid_id=s.asteroid_id WHERE s.status='active' AND sb.moid_au IS NOT NULL ORDER BY sb.moid_au ASC LIMIT 20

panels.title: NeoWs Hazardous vs CAD Distance Correlation

targets.rawSql:
SELECT time_bucket('1 month', n.close_approach_date) AS "time", COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE n.is_potentially_hazardous) AS "NeoWs Hazardous", MIN(c.distance_au) AS "CAD Min Dist (AU)"
FROM neo_close_approaches n LEFT JOIN neo_agency_cad c ON c.asteroid_id=n.asteroid_id AND DATE_TRUNC('month',c.approach_date)=DATE_TRUNC('month',n.close_approach_date) WHERE n.close_approach_date BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT asteroid_id AS "ID", sbdb_fullname AS "Name", orbit_class_name AS "Class", ROUND(sbdb_diameter_km::numeric,3) AS "Diam (km)", ROUND(moid_au::numeric,5) AS "MOID", ROUND(eccentricity::numeric,4) AS "e", ROUND(semi_major_axis_au::numeric,3) AS "a (AU)", is_pha AS "PHA", sentry_status AS "Sentry", ROUND(palermo_scale_cum::numeric,2) AS "JPL PS", ROUND(esa_ps_cum::numeric,2) AS "ESA PS", esa_on_risk_list AS "ESA Risk", spectral_type AS "Spec", discovery_date AS "Discovered"
FROM neo_asteroid_profile WHERE sbdb_fullname IS NOT NULL ORDER BY sbdb_diameter_km DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 100

SELECT approach_date AS "Date", fullname AS "Object", ROUND(distance_au::numeric,5) AS "Dist (AU)", ROUND(v_rel_km_s::numeric,2) AS "V Rel", ROUND(diameter_km::numeric,3) AS "Diam (km)", h_mag AS "H", on_sentry_watchlist AS "Sentry?", palermo_scale_cum AS "Palermo", esa_risk AS "ESA Risk?"
FROM neo_cad_upcoming LIMIT 100
SELECT approach_date AS "time", distance_au AS "Distance (AU)" FROM neo_agency_cad WHERE approach_date BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() AND distance_au<0.05 ORDER BY approach_date

SELECT time_bucket('3 months', approach_date) AS "time", MIN(distance_au) AS "Closest (AU)", COUNT(*) AS "Count" FROM neo_agency_cad WHERE approach_date BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT fullname AS "Object", approach_date AS "Date", ROUND(distance_au::numeric,6) AS "Dist (AU)", ROUND(v_rel_km_s::numeric,2) AS "V Rel", ROUND(diameter_km::numeric,3) AS "Diam (km)" FROM neo_agency_cad ORDER BY distance_au ASC NULLS LAST LIMIT 20

SELECT
  (FLOOR(v_rel_km_s::numeric / 4) * 4)::text || '-' ||
  (FLOOR(v_rel_km_s::numeric / 4) * 4 + 4)::text AS "V Rel (km/s)",
  COUNT(*) AS "Count"
FROM neo_agency_cad
WHERE v_rel_km_s IS NOT NULL AND v_rel_km_s BETWEEN 0 AND 80
GROUP BY FLOOR(v_rel_km_s::numeric / 4)
ORDER BY FLOOR(v_rel_km_s::numeric / 4)
SELECT orbit_class_name AS "Class", total AS "Count" FROM neo_orbit_class_dist ORDER BY total DESC LIMIT 12
SELECT orbit_class_name AS "Class", pha_count AS "PHA", total-pha_count AS "Non-PHA" FROM neo_orbit_class_dist ORDER BY total DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT TO_CHAR(ROUND(t_jup::numeric*2)/2,'FM990.0') AS "T_J", COUNT(*) AS "Count" FROM neo_agency_sbdb WHERE t_jup IS NOT NULL AND t_jup BETWEEN 2 AND 7 GROUP BY ROUND(t_jup::numeric*2)/2 ORDER BY ROUND(t_jup::numeric*2)/2

SELECT
  ROUND((FLOOR(moid_au::numeric / 0.01) * 0.01)::numeric, 2)::text AS "MOID (AU)",
  COUNT(*) AS "Count"
FROM neo_agency_sbdb
WHERE moid_au IS NOT NULL AND moid_au < 0.05
GROUP BY FLOOR(moid_au::numeric / 0.01)
ORDER BY FLOOR(moid_au::numeric / 0.01)

SELECT
  ROUND((FLOOR(diameter_km::numeric / 0.5) * 0.5)::numeric, 1)::text AS "Diameter (km)",
  COUNT(*) AS "Count"
FROM neo_agency_sbdb
WHERE diameter_km IS NOT NULL AND diameter_km < 10
GROUP BY FLOOR(diameter_km::numeric / 0.5)
ORDER BY FLOOR(diameter_km::numeric / 0.5)

SELECT condition_code::text || ' - ' || CASE WHEN condition_code::text = '0' THEN 'Highly Certain' WHEN condition_code::text IN ('1','2','3') THEN 'Certain' WHEN condition_code::text IN ('4','5','6') THEN 'Moderate' WHEN condition_code::text IN ('7','8') THEN 'Uncertain' WHEN condition_code::text = '9' THEN 'Highly Uncertain' ELSE 'Unknown' END AS "Code", COUNT(*) AS "Count" FROM neo_agency_sbdb WHERE condition_code IS NOT NULL GROUP BY condition_code ORDER BY condition_code

SELECT orbit_class_name AS "Class", total AS "Count", pha_count AS "PHAs", ROUND(avg_moid_au::numeric,5) AS "Avg MOID", ROUND(avg_eccentricity::numeric,4) AS "Avg e", ROUND(avg_diameter_km::numeric,3) AS "Avg Diam", ROUND(avg_t_jup::numeric,2) AS "Avg T_J" FROM neo_orbit_class_dist ORDER BY total DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) AS "Events" FROM neo_fireball_events
SELECT ROUND(MAX(impact_energy_kt)::numeric,2) AS "Max (kt)" FROM neo_fireball_events
SELECT ROUND(AVG(velocity_km_s)::numeric,1) AS "Avg Vel (km/s)" FROM neo_fireball_events
SELECT event_date AS "time", impact_energy_kt AS "Energy (kt)" FROM neo_fireball_events WHERE event_date BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() ORDER BY event_date
SELECT year::text AS "Year", event_count AS "Events", ROUND(total_energy_kt::numeric,1) AS "Total Energy (kt)" FROM neo_fireball_annual ORDER BY year DESC LIMIT 30

SELECT event_date AS "Date", CONCAT(latitude,'° ',latitude_dir) AS "Lat", CONCAT(longitude,'° ',longitude_dir) AS "Lon", altitude_km AS "Alt (km)", velocity_km_s AS "Vel", ROUND(impact_energy_kt::numeric,3) AS "Energy (kt)" FROM neo_fireball_events ORDER BY impact_energy_kt DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 20

SELECT
  (FLOOR(velocity_km_s::numeric / 4) * 4)::text || '-' ||
  (FLOOR(velocity_km_s::numeric / 4) * 4 + 4)::text AS "Vel (km/s)",
  COUNT(*) AS "Count"
FROM neo_fireball_events
WHERE velocity_km_s IS NOT NULL AND velocity_km_s BETWEEN 0 AND 80
GROUP BY FLOOR(velocity_km_s::numeric / 4)
ORDER BY FLOOR(velocity_km_s::numeric / 4)

SELECT
  (FLOOR(altitude_km::numeric / 10) * 10)::text || '-' ||
  (FLOOR(altitude_km::numeric / 10) * 10 + 10)::text AS "Alt (km)",
  COUNT(*) AS "Count"
FROM neo_fireball_events
WHERE altitude_km IS NOT NULL AND altitude_km BETWEEN 0 AND 200
GROUP BY FLOOR(altitude_km::numeric / 10)
ORDER BY FLOOR(altitude_km::numeric / 10)

SELECT event_date AS "Date", CONCAT(latitude,'° ',latitude_dir) AS "Lat", CONCAT(longitude,'° ',longitude_dir) AS "Lon", altitude_km AS "Alt", velocity_km_s AS "Vel", ROUND(impact_energy_kt::numeric,3) AS "Impact (kt)" FROM neo_fireball_events ORDER BY event_date DESC LIMIT 50

panels.description: Known MPC sites first; (no site in SBDB) counts rows where SBDB has no discovery_site (data is still loaded).
panels.title: Top Discovery Sites

targets.rawSql:
SELECT site AS "Site", cnt AS "Count" FROM (
  SELECT
    CASE WHEN discovery_site IS NULL OR BTRIM(discovery_site) = '' THEN '(no site in SBDB)'
         ELSE BTRIM(discovery_site) END AS site,
    COUNT(*)::bigint AS cnt
  FROM neo_agency_sbdb
  GROUP BY 1
) x
ORDER BY (CASE WHEN site = '(no site in SBDB)' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), cnt DESC
LIMIT 12

SELECT
  ((FLOOR(data_arc_days::numeric / 1825) * 5)::int)::text || '-' ||
  (((FLOOR(data_arc_days::numeric / 1825) * 5) + 5)::int)::text || ' yr' AS "Data arc",
  COUNT(*) AS "Count"
FROM neo_agency_sbdb
WHERE data_arc_days IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY FLOOR(data_arc_days::numeric / 1825)
ORDER BY FLOOR(data_arc_days::numeric / 1825)

SELECT time_bucket('1 month', close_approach_date) AS "time", COUNT(*) AS "All", COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE is_potentially_hazardous) AS "Hazardous", MIN(miss_distance_astronomical::float) AS "Closest (AU)" FROM neo_close_approaches WHERE close_approach_date BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT
  ROUND((FLOOR(miss_distance_astronomical::numeric / 0.05) * 0.05)::numeric, 2)::text AS "Miss Dist (AU)",
  COUNT(*) AS "Count"
FROM neo_close_approaches
WHERE miss_distance_astronomical IS NOT NULL
  AND miss_distance_astronomical::float BETWEEN 0 AND 0.5
  AND close_approach_date BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
GROUP BY FLOOR(miss_distance_astronomical::numeric / 0.05)
ORDER BY FLOOR(miss_distance_astronomical::numeric / 0.05)

SELECT
  (FLOOR(relative_velocity_km_s::numeric / 4) * 4)::text || '-' ||
  (FLOOR(relative_velocity_km_s::numeric / 4) * 4 + 4)::text AS "Vel (km/s)",
  COUNT(*) AS "Count"
FROM neo_close_approaches
WHERE relative_velocity_km_s IS NOT NULL
  AND relative_velocity_km_s::float BETWEEN 0 AND 80
  AND close_approach_date BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
GROUP BY FLOOR(relative_velocity_km_s::numeric / 4)
ORDER BY FLOOR(relative_velocity_km_s::numeric / 4)
SELECT date_trunc('hour', ingestion_time) AS "time", COUNT(*) AS "Records" FROM neo_agency_sbdb WHERE ingestion_time BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT 'NeoWs' AS source, COUNT(DISTINCT asteroid_id) AS count FROM neo_close_approaches UNION ALL SELECT 'SBDB', COUNT(*) FROM neo_agency_sbdb UNION ALL SELECT 'Sentry', COUNT(*) FROM neo_agency_sentry UNION ALL SELECT 'CAD', COUNT(DISTINCT asteroid_id) FROM neo_agency_cad UNION ALL SELECT 'ESA', COUNT(*) FROM neo_agency_esa UNION ALL SELECT 'Fireball', COUNT(*) FROM neo_fireball_events ORDER BY count DESC
